modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Desktop computer not powering on after shutdown

full_description_text:
- My desktop computer no turn on.  
- I press power button, nothing happen.  
- Windows environment, need help fast.
short_description: Desktop computer not powering on after shutdown
description:
